ValidationRule.description: When users selects Reason For Type Change, we require them to populatecomment.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISBLANK(Reason_For_Type_SubType_Change_Comment__c) , NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Reason_For_Type_SubType_Change__c))) , TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c)='LSDX' , fxRecordTypeDevName__c='Customer_Care_General'/*Asked by Isa on Email scope Of AI is only for CC general cases with case origin : Email*/ , TEXT(Origin)='Email' , NOT($Permission.C_PERM_2400_Bypass_Case_V_RULES)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_054: Kindly provide the comment for selecting the Reason for Type change.
